heading: Absence resulting from hostile action abroad
label: 6325 Absence resulting from hostile action abroad

children.text: incurred while serving abroad and resulting from war, insurgency, mob violence, or similar hostile action; and
not due to vicious habits, intemperance, or willful misconduct on the part of the employee.
